channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Harris leading Trump by 5 points among likely voters: Poll
item.description: Vice President Harris is leading former President Trump by 5 points nationally among likely voters, according to a Marist Poll survey released Wednesday. Harris and her running mate, Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz (D), received 52 percent support, while Trump and his running mate, Sen.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jill Biden is out campaigning again — but not for her husband anymore. She's pumping up Harris
item.description: CLAWSON, Mich. (AP) — Jill Biden wasted no time after she stepped up to the microphone at a suburban Detroit restaurant. “Now some have come to (the) Detroit area recently and thrown around some insults, but from what I’ve seen this is a vibrant, thriving city,” she said.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: North Carolina Democrat leader resigns after arrest for allegedly stealing Trump roadside signs
item.description: Moore County, North Carolina, Democratic Party Chair Lowell Simon resigned after admitting to stealing pro-Trump political signs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Afghan national accused in terror plot was not vetted for SIV status, despite past Biden admin claims
item.description: The Biden-Harris administration has backtracked and now admits that an Afghan national accused of an Election Day terror plot did not undergo certain vetting they previously claimed he passed.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AOC fires back at Fetterman, accuses him of 'bleak dunk attempt'
item.description: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez fired back, accusing Sen. John Fetterman of a 'bleak dunk attempt' after he shared a screenshot of a headline mentioning her.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Iowa emerges as key battleground in race for the House
item.description: In their fight to flip the House, Democrats are eyeing gains in what may seem an unlikely spot: Iowa. Two GOP seats in the Hawkeye State have emerged as true battlegrounds in the final stretch of the campaign, as some election forecasters have moved Reps.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lillis, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump: Black and Hispanic voters who vote for Harris 'gotta have your head examined'
item.description: The former president suggested any Black or Hispanic voters who do not support him should have their head examined, echoing a similar comment he has made about Jewish voters backing Democrats.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Control of the Minnesota House is up for grabs this fall. Here are 14 races to watch
item.description: While all seats in the Minnesota House of Representatives are on the ballot this fall, just a fraction are taking up the focus and much of the fundraising for the major parties.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Trump emphasizes hypermasculinity as he and Harris pursue male voters
item.description: Attention, American men: Donald Trump and his allies want you to believe your vote says big things about your masculinity. In the final weeks before the Nov.
item.dc:creator: LAURIE KELLMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Harris' Fox interview a bigger risk for Bret Baier: Bill O'Reilly
item.description: Bill O'Reilly discusses the state of the race as Kamala Harris and Donald Trump work to energize key voter groups.
item.dc:creator: Leland Vittert, NewsNation

item.title: Hurricane misinformation stokes fears ahead of election
item.description: The flood of conspiracy theories and rumors following the severe weather in the South is sparking concerns that political figures’ embrace of misinformation is just the beginning as the general election draws closer.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, NewsNation

item.title: One-quarter of applicants ruled out colleges because of states' political climate: Poll
item.description: Out of that group, about two-thirds decided to exclude certain schools at the beginning of their search, the organization found.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, NewsNation

item.title: Minnesota city says Trump campaign still owes more than $200,000 for July rally
item.description: Local officials say former President Donald Trump’s campaign still owes a central Minnesota city nearly $209,000 for services related to a July campaign rally. The Minnesota Star Tribune reports that the bill is for services beyond what St. Cloud normally provides.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Harris slams Trump for suggesting military handle 'enemy from within' as they vie for Pennsylvania
item.description: Harris, at a rally in Pennsylvania, called Trump a serious threat to American democracy who is “out for unchecked power.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, WILL WEISSERT and MARK SCOLFORO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Geraldo Rivera endorses Harris, says Trump 'unfit'
item.description: NewsNation correspondent-at-large Geraldo Rivera said Monday that he's endorsing Kamala Harris for president.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: Rep. Marie Gluesenkamp Perez, challenger Joe Kent face off in Washington 3rd District debate
item.description: One of the races that could determine the fate of Congress this election season happens to be the rematch race for Washington's 3rd District, and on Monday night, the candidates will debate on KOIN 6.
item.dc:creator: Michaela Bourgeois, NewsNation

item.title: Shannon Bilbray-Axelrod discusses growth, traffic, and affordable housing in county commissioner race
item.description: Shannon Bilbray-Axelrod, a candidate for county commissioner and current Nevada Assembly member, discussed her key priorities for her district on the 8 News Now Daily Voting Guide.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: With hunting party, Walz invites moderate male voters into the fold
item.description: Independent voter David Clayton joined Gov. Tim Walz at Saturday’s pheasant opener and says he’s sold on voting for the Harris-Walz ticket. He thinks others may be, too, but aren’t talking about it. “There are many, many MAGA-minded Americans who aren’t really so MAGA-minded.
item.dc:creator: Cathy Wurzer, Megan Burks, and Gracie Stockton, MPR News

item.title: 3 voter-related lawsuits dropped in Nevada ahead of Election Day
item.description: Petitioners who filed three lawsuits challenging the maintenance of Nevada’s voter rolls have dismissed their cases, in part because voting by-mail ballot was already well underway.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Georgia election workers move closer to collecting Rudy Giuliani’s assets
item.description: Two Georgia election workers are pushing to collect their $146 million defamation judgment against Rudy Giuliani, but the former New York City mayor is digging in amid an array of financial troubles.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, NewsNation

item.title: Voters with disabilities are feeling ignored by presidential candidates
item.description: A new report from Rutgers University estimates that about 40.2 million eligible voters in the quickly approaching U.S. presidential election are disabled.
item.dc:creator: KENYA HUNTER and AYANNA ALEXANDER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Are political disagreements stressing you out? Here are tips to bridge the divide
item.description: With only weeks to a divisive election it can be hard to talk politics. Polarization can damage our relationships and our health. We have strategies to reduce election stress, starting with ourselves.
item.dc:creator: Allison Aubrey, MPR News

item.title: Control of state House could hinge on a sleepy district outside Duluth
item.description: Control of the Minnesota House of Representatives could come down to one race in a district outside Duluth, where first-term Republican Natalie Zeleznikar is being challenged by Democratic retired judge Mark Munger.
item.dc:creator: Dan Kraker, MPR News

item.title: What $35 trillion in US national debt means for Americans
item.description: With the national debt standing at more than $35 trillion, economists fear that the country's debt load will only grow
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Donald Trump holds a rally in California, a state he's almost certain to lose
item.description: The White House election is expected to come down to battlegrounds such as Wisconsin and Pennsylvania.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Inside the TikTok documents: Stripping teens and boosting ‘attractive’ people
item.description: A trove of secret documents show teens’ increasingly reliant on TikTok and how executives were acutely aware of the potential harm the app can cause young people, but appeared unconcerned.
item.dc:creator: Bobby Allyn, Sylvia Goodman, and Dara Kerr, MPR News

item.title: Harris helps pack aid boxes for North Carolina hurricane victims ahead of Sunday campaign push
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris on Saturday helped pack diapers into boxes of personal care products destined for North Carolina hurricane victims, agreeing with one helper who said “it takes a village.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump hears at a Latino campaign event from someone who lived in the US illegally
item.description: Minutes after Donald Trump delivered his standard warnings about drug dealers and criminals illegally crossing the border during a Saturday campaign event, the former president heard from someone who was once in the country illegally but now plans to vote for him.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT and NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Hunting for male voters: Walz steps into the field for the pheasant opener
item.description: Gov. Tim Walz had more pheasant hunting companions than usual for this year’s opener near Sleepy Eye, on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Ben Hovland and The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Who is not allowed to vote in the 2024 presidential election?
item.description: The United States is just weeks away from a highly-anticipated presidential election, but not everyone will be able to exercise their right to vote on Nov. 5.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, PIX 11

item.title: Rebuilding Florida after Hurricane Milton and protecting against scams
item.description:
Recovery efforts can unite communities after catastrophic damage. Neighbors come together to help one another, while state officials and law enforcement work diligently to restore order. Gradually, residents begin to see their homes return to normalcy.
But even with the good, comes the bad.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Walz returns to Mankato to reprise role as coach, deliver football pep talk and campaign a little
item.description: The governor stopped through on a campaign visit marking the 25th anniversary of the season the Mankato West football team won the state championship with him as assistant coach. He will attend the Governors Pheasant opener in Sleepy Eye Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Yang, MPR News

item.title: Tameka Henry discusses oversight, safety, and leadership in Clark County School District race
item.description: Tameka Henry, a candidate for the Clark County Board of Trustees, appeared on the 8 News Now Daily Voting Guide to discuss her platform and vision for improving the school district.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Michigan newspaper issues correction after Trump claims he won Man of Year award
item.description: A Michigan newspaper issued a correction after former President Donald Trump cited the paper at a speech in Detroit claiming he was Michigan’s “Man of the Year” in 2023.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, Fox 5

item.title: Annette Dawson Owens discusses education, healthcare, and affordable housing
item.description: Annette Dawson Owens, a Republican candidate for Nevada’s Assembly District 29, recently discussed her views on education, healthcare, and affordable housing on 8 News Now’s Daily Voting Guide.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Cameron CH Miller discusses his vision for Las Vegas City Council Ward 5
item.description: Cameron CH Miller, a Democratic state assemblyman and candidate for Las Vegas City Council, shared his plans and priorities for Ward 5 on 8 News Now’s Daily Voting Guide.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Ryan Hamilton discusses homelessness, the Animal Foundation, and F1
item.description: Ryan Hamilton, a Republican candidate for the Clark County Commission, appeared on 8 News Now's Daily Voting Guide to share his perspective on homelessness, animal welfare, and Formula One's impact on the local economy as the election nears.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News
